docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,800.00 FILED BY DAVIS, RODNEY L AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET GROUP, INC. BOB JR'S TOWING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RODNEY L ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RODNEY L AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET GROUP, INC.
COPYING FEES (24 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RODNEY L
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS NOT LISTED SERVED JUL-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOB JR'S TOWING INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-02-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET GROUP, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RODNEY L DAVIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET GROUP, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOB SR'S TOWING INC. (ROBERT FABRIS JR.) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, RODNEY L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET GROUP, INC. $7,800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,800.00, AVIS BUDGET GROUP, INC. SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $7800.00. THE COURT FINDS NO LIABILITY FOR DEFENDANT BOB JR. TOWING INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROBERT FABRIS JR FILED BY DEFENDANT BOB JR'S TOWING INC.
